RepoWorkspace.emptyStateDescription: Each prompt creates or continues an agent run for this repository.
RepoWorkspace.quickPrompt1: Review this repository and list release blockers.
RepoWorkspace.quickPrompt2: Find the most critical security risks and explain impact.
RepoWorkspace.quickPrompt3: Give a ship or block verdict with short reasoning.
